title: ipomoea stolonifera
intro: Ipomoea stolonifera, also known as Japanese morning glory or bindweed, is a perennial climbing plant native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea stolonifera include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating insomnia, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea stolonifera include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a restful night's sleep.
